ticket_title: BE - Receipt updates from GTM feedback

test_cases.name: TC-1: Printed receipt shows the activated phone number (MDN) on a single device line item [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: A completed activation transaction exists with order number 21935 at store BRANDON / EZLOGIC; The device on that order is: SAM A166U A16 5G 128G BLU KIT with MDN 7865551234; The store portal receipt view is accessible | Test Data: Order: 21935; Device: SAM A166U A16 5G 128G BLU KIT; MDN: 7865551234

steps.action: Log in to the store portal as an authorized store representative for BRANDON / EZLOGIC
Navigate to the receipt for order 21935
Locate the device line item for SAM A166U A16 5G 128G BLU KIT
steps.expected: The phone number "7865551234" is displayed on the SAM A166U A16 5G 128G BLU KIT device line, visible alongside the SKU and serial number

test_cases.name: TC-2: Printed receipt renders a $120.00 discount as "-$120.00" with a leading minus sign [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: A completed activation transaction exists with order number 21935 at store BRANDON / EZLOGIC; A discount of $120.00 was applied to that transaction; The store portal receipt view is accessible | Test Data: Order: 21935; Discount amount applied: $120.00

steps.action: Log in to the store portal as an authorized store representative for BRANDON / EZLOGIC
Navigate to the receipt for order 21935
Locate the "Discount:" line in the totals section of the receipt
steps.expected: The Discount line reads "Discount: -$120.00" — the value has a leading minus sign, not parentheses, and is not displayed as the positive value "$120.00"

test_cases.name: TC-3: Receipt shows "Add-Ons: Metro Basic Protection" and contains no legacy plan or coupon labels [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: A completed activation transaction exists with order number 21935 at store BRANDON / EZLOGIC; Device SAM A166U A16 5G 128G BLU KIT was activated with one add-on: Metro Basic Protection; The store portal receipt view is accessible | Test Data: Order: 21935; Device: SAM A166U A16 5G 128G BLU KIT; Add-on purchased: Metro Basic Protection

steps.action: Log in to the store portal as an authorized store representative for BRANDON / EZLOGIC
Navigate to the receipt for order 21935
Locate the device section for SAM A166U A16 5G 128G BLU KIT
Review all labels and values visible in the device section
steps.expected: An "Add-Ons: Metro Basic Protection" entry appears under the device section. None of the following labels are present anywhere on the receipt: "Plan:", "Description:", "Monthly Plan:", "Promo:", "Edge Coupon:", "Coupon Description:"

test_cases.name: TC-4: Two-device receipt shows the correct phone number (MDN) on each device line independently [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: A completed activation transaction exists with order number 21936 containing two devices; Device 1: SAM A166U A16 5G 128G BLU KIT, MDN: 7865551234; Device 2: APL IPHONE SE3 NP 64G BLK KIT, MDN: 7865555678; The store portal receipt view is accessible | Test Data: Order: 21936; Device 1 MDN: 7865551234; Device 2 MDN: 7865555678

steps.action: Log in to the store portal as an authorized store representative
Navigate to the receipt for order 21936
Locate the SAM A166U A16 5G 128G BLU KIT line item and note the MDN shown
Locate the APL IPHONE SE3 NP 64G BLK KIT line item and note the MDN shown
steps.expected: The SAM A166U line shows MDN "7865551234" and the APL IPHONE SE3 line shows MDN "7865555678" — neither line displays the other device's phone number

test_cases.name: TC-5: Device line with no add-ons purchased shows no legacy plan code labels and no empty Add-Ons row [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: A completed activation transaction exists with order number 21937; Device SAM A166U A16 5G 128G BLU KIT was activated with zero add-ons on that line; The store portal receipt view is accessible | Test Data: Order: 21937; Device: SAM A166U A16 5G 128G BLU KIT; Add-ons purchased: none

steps.action: Log in to the store portal as an authorized store representative
Navigate to the receipt for order 21937
Locate the device section for SAM A166U A16 5G 128G BLU KIT
Check for the presence of any "Add-Ons:", "Plan:", "Edge Coupon:", "Promo:", or "Monthly Plan:" labels in that section
steps.expected: No "Plan:", "Promo:", "Edge Coupon:", "Monthly Plan:", or "Coupon Description:" labels appear. The receipt either omits the Add-Ons row entirely or shows "Add-Ons: None" — it does not display internal codes such as "BFLX60" or "COUP_NEUUQZ"

test_cases.name: TC-6: Transaction with no discount applied does not print a "Discount:" line on the receipt [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: A completed activation transaction exists with order number 21938; No discount was applied to this transaction; The store portal receipt view is accessible | Test Data: Order: 21938; Discount: not applied

steps.action: Log in to the store portal as an authorized store representative
Navigate to the receipt for order 21938
Scan the full receipt for any "Discount:" label
steps.expected: No "Discount:" line appears anywhere on the receipt — the receipt does not show a "Discount: -$0.00" row or any blank discount row

test_cases.name: TC-7: Digitally emailed receipt also displays the activated phone number (MDN) on the device line [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: A completed activation transaction exists with order number 21939; Device: APL IPHONE SE3 NP 64G BLK KIT, MDN: 7865559900; Customer email on file: qa.tester@realtime.com; Email receipt delivery is enabled for this account | Test Data: Order: 21939; Device: APL IPHONE SE3 NP 64G BLK KIT; MDN: 7865559900; Customer email: qa.tester@realtime.com

steps.action: Trigger the digital receipt send for order 21939 from the store portal
Open the email inbox at qa.tester@realtime.com
Open the receipt email for order 21939
Locate the APL IPHONE SE3 NP 64G BLK KIT device line in the email body
steps.expected: The phone number "7865559900" is displayed on the APL IPHONE SE3 line item in the emailed receipt, confirming the MDN field change applies to the digital receipt channel as well as the printed one

test_cases.name: TC-8: Existing tax and subtotal rows retain their positive values and are unaffected by the receipt changes [Priority: Low]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: A completed activation transaction exists with order number 21935 that includes a Tax row and a Subtotal row in the receipt totals section; Tax amount for order 21935: $8.50; The store portal receipt view is accessible | Test Data: Order: 21935; Tax: $8.50; Subtotal: pre-discount total for the order (positive value)

steps.action: Log in to the store portal as an authorized store representative for BRANDON / EZLOGIC
Navigate to the receipt for order 21935
Locate the Tax row in the totals section
Locate the Subtotal row in the totals section
steps.expected: The Tax row displays "$8.50" as a positive value (no leading minus sign). The Subtotal row shows the correct pre-discount total as a positive value. Neither row has been reformatted, removed, or altered by the receipt changes in this ticket
